channel.title: RoundSignal - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: RoundSignal 2026-W30: 10 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
RoundSignal Issue 2026-W30

Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

10 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

Alta

heat 82

Trigger: $25M Series A (Calcalist, as of 8 Jul 2026)

Why now: Fresh Series A capital for a sales & marketing AI platform means budget to build out GTM, content and RevOps tooling - and they explicitly frame themselves as infrastructure for marketing/sales, so they value your domain expertise.

Who to contact: VP Marketing / Head of Growth

Angle: Reference their 'AWS for marketing and sales' framing and offer a 2-week sprint to stand up the demand-gen/RevOps motion behind that positioning before the Series A hiring wave hits.

source

Float

heat 78

Trigger: €4.5M Series A (BeBeez International, as of 15 Jul 2026)

Why now: Stockholm-born AI-native finance platform targeting European startups just raised Series A to expand - a classic B2B SaaS scaling moment where design, growth and content services fit perfectly.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Growth

Angle: Note their expansion push across European startup markets and offer localized launch/growth support to accelerate multi-market customer acquisition post-raise.

source

Xentra

heat 74

Trigger: €3.18M (£2.7M) investment from Maven VCTs & NPIF II (EU-Startups, as of 20 Jul 2026)

Why now: Leeds cybersecurity SaaS for SMEs explicitly plans to strengthen leadership and accelerate customer acquisition with this raise - clear demand for recruiting, growth and RevOps services right now.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Sales

Angle: They said the money is for senior hires and customer acquisition - offer a recruiting-plus-demand-gen bundle to hit both goals inside their 48h-fresh funding window.

source

Sherpa

heat 72

Trigger: $2.2M pre-seed (Tech.eu, as of 9 Jul 2026)

Why now: German AI workforce-management SaaS at pre-seed - small team, no established brand or GTM function yet, exactly when fractional/freelance marketing, design and dev help is most needed.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Offer a founder-friendly brand-and-website package to turn their fresh pre-seed into a credible enterprise-ready presence before their first sales push.

source

Pascal

heat 68

Trigger: $9M round (Fortune, as of 16 Jul 2026)

Why now: Prediction-market startup raised $9M to challenge Kalshi and Polymarket - a scaling fintech-adjacent SaaS that needs brand, growth and product-marketing muscle to compete with heavyweights.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Marketing

Angle: Pitch a competitive-differentiation growth play: position Pascal against Kalshi/Polymarket with a sharp brand and acquisition funnel while the raise is fresh.

source

Gradium

heat 66

Trigger: $100M seed backed by Nvidia (TechCrunch, as of 9 Jul 2026)

Why now: Paris AI-voice startup with a massive $100M seed and Nvidia backing - well-funded, brand-new, and about to scale headcount and GTM fast, creating heavy demand for recruiting, brand and content services.

Who to contact: COO / Head of People or Marketing

Angle: With a $100M seed you're hiring and building GTM from scratch - offer to stand up recruiting pipelines or a launch brand system before the scale-up chaos sets in.

source

8Layers

heat 63

Trigger: pre-seed extended to €2.5M total (EU-Startups, as of 7 Jul 2026)

Why now: Spanish cybersecurity startup topping up its pre-seed - early-stage B2B SaaS with fresh cash and a lean team that typically outsources design, content and go-to-market.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Offer a GTM foundation package (positioning, website, first demand-gen campaigns) tailored to B2B cyber buyers to help them convert the extended pre-seed into pipeline.

source

Glacis Labs

heat 58

Trigger: $6.8M seed (The Block, as of 15 Jul 2026)

Why now: Crypto clearinghouse raised seed to expand its ZeroDelta platform - a technical B2B infrastructure startup needing product marketing, developer content and growth to reach institutional buyers.

Who to contact: Founder / Head of Growth

Angle: (unverified) Offer developer-focused content and go-to-market support to accelerate ZeroDelta adoption among institutional crypto players now that the seed is closed.

source

Sensesbit

heat 57

Trigger: €1M round with Clave Capital et al. (EU-Startups, as of 20 Jul 2026)

Why now: Spanish FoodTech SaaS with an AI sensory-intelligence platform raised €1M specifically to accelerate international expansion - a prime moment for growth, localization and PR services.

Who to contact: CEO / Co-founder

Angle: They're funding international expansion - offer a market-entry growth and PR package to help their AI sensory platform land in new countries fast.

source

AVELIN AI

heat 55

Trigger: $3.7M pre-seed (jawlah.co / entARABI, as of 9-10 Jul 2026)

Why now: UAE sovereign-AI startup at pre-seed with corroborating coverage - early B2B AI company with fresh cash and no established GTM, receptive to design, content and growth partners.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Offer to build an enterprise-credible brand and demand-gen engine around their sovereign-AI positioning while they staff up post-pre-seed.

source

© RoundSignal. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
